meta.title: Russia is LYING about its "hypersonic" Kinzhal Missile
meta.description:
Russia's "hypersonic" Kh47M2 Kinzhal missile is actually nothing more than an air-launched version of the 9K720 Iskander-M short-range ballistic missile. But Russia's used confusion around the word "hypersonic" to fool the world about this weapon's capabilities. 
#ukrainewar #ukraine #russia #hypersonic #hypersonicmissile #kinzhal #shorts 

Read more about this here: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/why-calling-russias-kinzhal-a-hypersonic-missile-is-a-stretch/
